title: America's Army: Proving Grounds
description:
Do you have what it takes to train like a U.S. Army Soldier?

Take on the role of an 11B Infantryman practicing combat maneuvers at JTC Griffin, a fabricated training MOUT (military operations on urban terrain) environment. This training is crucial to your success as part of a Long Range Combined Arms – Recon (LRCA-R) unit, a full spectrum capable team that embarks on special operations missions behind enemy lines.Key Features• You are a U.S. Army Soldier

• Two Game Modes with 4 objective types 

• Character and Weapon customization

• Teamwork is Critical

• Train in Shoot Houses

• Mission Editor and Steam Workshop
description_short: America’s Army: Proving Grounds is the official game of the U.S. Army and part of the highly acclaimed America’s Army game series. This free military game focuses on small unit tactical maneuvers and puts you to the test in a wide variety of new America’s Army maps and AA fan favorites.
